_comment: NPC: Guard Zhao (守卫赵). INFERRED: City gate guard. Tian Shui people believe in fate/omens, reflected in guard behavior.. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Guard Zhao
note: INFERRED: City gate guard. Tian Shui people believe in fate/omens, reflected in guard behavior.
initiation_lines: You approach Tian Shui City. The diviners say today is an auspicious day for travel — or perhaps not. Let me see your face before you enter.
Gao Qiming read my fortune once. Said I would live to see three hundred moons. I count every one.
The governor asks that all armed visitors register at the cultivator quarter. Fate favors the prepared.
A strange omen last night — the temple bells rang without wind. The priests are concerned.

sect_tasks.description: Guard Zhao checks his spear: 'The gate watch needs leather for armor and arrows for the towers. Bring me supplies and I will pay from the city fund.'
Guard Zhao lowers his voice: 'Strange occurrences at night. I need torches and coal to light the watch route. If you see anything unusual, report it.'
